name: Battle of Hunters : Beast Zone
short_description: BOH is a game in which up to 28 players fight the Battle Royal way. Team matches such as solo, duo, and squad are also possible. The characters in this game can use various martial arts skills and tame the monsters living in the field. This is a new concept martial arts/pet battle royal game
detailed_description:
Battle of Hunters : Beast Zone is a game in which up to 28 players fight the Battle Royal way.
Team matches such as solo, duo(2-people team), and squad(4-people team) are also possible.
The characters in this game can use various martial arts skills and hunt and tame the monsters living in the field.
This is a new concept martial arts/pet battle royal game where you can tame multiple pets and fight the enemies together.
This is a game which you defeat all your enemies during the game time and win if you become a final winner.
Defeat all the people and become the world master of martial arts.
You can fly in the sky, shoot a fireball, and you can be rife with all kinds of ruthless skills. This game will bring a joyful smile to your boring daily life!

You can fly in the sky, shoot a fireball, and you can be rife with all kinds of ruthless skills. This game will bring a joyful smile to your boring daily life!
supported_languages: English, Korean, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
